comments.comment_text:
a) ' Figure 25 presents a megaripple 
identified in the Lot 3 area, characterized by a wavelength of 14.17 m and a height of 0.28 m.' This does not relate to Figure 25, this should be Figure 23. You have also repeated this exact sentence on page 21. Please also check the wavelength given, is this correct?
comments.response_text: a) The duplicated sentence has been removed, and the wavelength value in Figure 25 has been updated.
comments.summary_ko: Figure 25 설명이 실제 Figure 23과 불일치. 메가리플 파장 14.17m, 높이 0.28m 내용이 잘못된 그림 참조.

comments.comment_text: a) Please ensure megaripples is one word. There are 5 cases of 'mega ripples'. Please correct for consistency

comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Table 1.
comments.summary_ko: 'MSRA Military Sealift and Repair Agreement' → 'Marine Scientific Research Act'로 수정.

comments.comment_text: a) Please make 'Boulder' plural so it should be 'Boulders'.
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 2.2.1

comments.comment_text: a) What did most of the debris consist of? I'm guessing most of it is fishery gear waste?
comments.response_text: a) Considering the high density of buoys within the survey area and the actively observed fishing activities, the identified 224 debris contacts and 124 linear debris features can generally be interpreted as fisheries-related debris (e.g., discarded fishing gear) based on their morphology and acoustic characteristics (linear debris likely representing lines/ropes or nets, and debris contacts potentially indicating ghost-fishing gear or remnant traces). However, the available survey data do not allow the origin of individual debris items to be confirmed; therefore, this interpretation is presented as a qualitative and inherently limited assessment.
comments.summary_ko: 잔해물 대부분의 구성 확인. 어업 폐기물(fishery gear waste) 추정.

comments.comment_text: a) Please make 'Wreck' plural so it should be 'Wrecks'.
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Chapter 2.2.4
a) It has been updated in Chapter 2.3.1

comments.comment_text: a) Figure 27 caption is incorrect. These are artificial reefs displayed, not 'Slope angles' , When referring to Slope angles, these should be seabed bedforms, not man-made objects. Perhaps this can be removed, and the more significant slope angles in Lot 3 could be documented? 'Area F' has a large sand wave, could this be documented? Please see example on the right >
comments.response_text: a) It has been updated in Figure 27
comments.summary_ko: Figure 27 캡션 오류. 인공 어초인데 'Slope angles'로 표기. 경사각은 자연 해저 지형에 적용. 구분 필요.

comments.comment_text: a) The general document layout is quite confusing and not optimised. There should be 3 core sections to the report: 1) Seabed Features/ Contacts 2) Seabed Morphology 3) Seabed Sediment Classification. Please can you follow this layout and ensure the contents 'flows' better to ensure less confusion.
comments.response_text: a)The report has been updated to reflect the requested revisions.
comments.summary_ko: 문서 레이아웃 개선 필요. 3개 핵심 섹션으로 재구성 제안: 1) Seabed Features/Contacts 2) Seabed Morphology 3) Seabed Sediment Classification.
